A birthday letter, built with love & a little code ✦

Happy
Birthday

to the person who has seen every version of me and loved me through all of them.

scroll to begin ↓

// built by your geek best friend

I could have sent you a card.
I could have just called.
But you know me — I had to build you something.
Because some people deserve more than a message.
They deserve a whole world made just for them.

This one's yours. Every pixel of it. 🤍

the letter

15 years. Think about that for a second.

We've grown up, grown apart in distance, grown back together in ways that still amaze me.

We've unlearned things that no longer served us and learned new ones — sometimes from each other, sometimes alongside each other, always for each other.

The miles never really touched what we have. Neither did time, nor change, nor all the chaos life threw our way.

If anything, everything we've survived has only made me more certain of you.

You are one of the great loves of my life — the kind that doesn't need a label or an occasion to be felt. Today just gives me a beautiful excuse to say it out loud.

the memories

Here's to us —
15 years of moments
worth keeping.

for always

Here's to you. Here's to us.
Here's to every year still ahead of us —
growing, laughing, unlearning,
and figuring it all out together.

With all my love — always yours ✨

🤍
